lessons: [council] KEEP: This project is a multi-agent orchestration framework using Ollama; the swarm should first document the architecture to clarify agent roles and communication patterns.

[council] **Concrete next action:** The swarm should **create a comprehensive `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`** that documents the agent lifecycle, message passing, and how to define custom agents. This will help new contributors understand the system and identify missing pieces.

[council] This project is a multi-agent orchestration framework using Ollama; the swarm should first document the architecture to clarify agent roles and communication patterns. _(from: MY POSITION)_
Conversation summary with AI assistant (Grok): Extensive review and upgrades to ollama_swarm infrastructure for durability/reliability/sustainability.

Brain role redefined: No longer reviews/patches system code. Now acts as librarian/master-admin focused on run lifecycle: initializing, starting runs, finishing runs, reviewing records, providing final analysis.

Introduced RunEventHub to centralize and organize diverse event/logging pipes by functionality (lifecycle, agent, transcript, todo, brain, diag, usage). Supports categories, sinks (broadcaster, eventLogger, debug file per-run).
Added correlation: reqId on HTTP, deeper runId threading into providers, OllamaClient, WS events, loggers. Structured logger with context.
ActiveRun class extracted with RAII cleanup, dispose guard, attachMonitors/hub, centralized stop logic to prevent resource leaks.
Brain analysis made optional via RunConfig.enableBrainAnalysis. Renamed internal proposal/insight stores.
Per-provider undici agents for connection reuse/isolation instead of global dispatcher.
Extracted Ollama timeout controller for reusability.
OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD now truly optional (basic auth only if real password set).
Added conversational Brain chat on SetupForm start page using textarea (multi-line), auto-applies JSON configs, dark-mode compatible with ink colors.
Other: Fixed Windows kills with treeKill, added fault-injection helpers, debug sinks, more logging unification.
